summary: Backend testing for multi-tenant POS bug fixes: inventory tenant_id, sales report exclusions, delivery credits filtering. All 13 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: inventory_system.py raw-materials-new endpoints correctly include tenant_id via get_user_tenant_id() at lines 606, 632, 675, 700
reports_routes.py sales report correctly excludes cancelled/refunded orders at line 32: status $nin [cancelled, refunded] AND is_refunded $ne True
reports_routes.py correctly labels driver deliveries as 'توصيل سائقين' at lines 137-138
reports_routes.py delivery-credits correctly filters for delivery companies only using $or with delivery_app, delivery_app_name, is_delivery_company, delivery_commission
server.py delivery-credits at line 12466 also excludes cancelled/refunded orders
_sn() helper function properly handles null values converting to 0 for safe math operations
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Material and TEST_VerifyTenantId raw materials for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified working: 1) Raw materials created with tenant_id field, 2) Sales report excludes refunded/cancelled orders, 3) Driver deliveries labeled 'توصيل سائقين', 4) Delivery credits report only shows delivery companies. Current tenant has no orders so payment method breakdown is empty but code logic verified correct.

sales_report_exclusions.evidence: Query includes status $nin [cancelled, refunded] AND is_refunded $ne True

driver_deliveries_label.evidence: Code sets pm_display = 'توصيل سائقين' for driver deliveries

delivery_credits_company_only.evidence: Query uses $or to filter for delivery_app, delivery_app_name, is_delivery_company, or delivery_commission > 0

pending_orders_separate.evidence: Code separates paid_orders from pending_orders at lines 86-87 and adds 'معلق' to by_payment at lines 187-189
